## [00:00 - 03:04]

Okay, so this video is about the circle of awesome, which is really about how you scale your business. So in a circle of awesome, it's this idea where you often go from seed launch to internal launch to JV launch. And when you do that, one of the things about this business is you always, well, you'll generally want to have additional offers. They could be upsells or they could be offers, products that people get after they buy from you the first time. Because once someone buys from you the first time, it's a lot easier to sell to them a second time. And so when you start publishing and start using PLF and putting these sequences together, you will create a conversation between yourself and the people that you're selling to, the people in your market, the people, your prospects and your clients. And they'll help you come up with ideas for your next product. It happens, well, it just happens every single time. Once you create something and you do a good job and you communicate it, you do a launch and people love you, they'll tell you what to create in the next product and then you go around and create that next product. And so what you end up doing is, and you don't always have to follow every one of these steps, but it works really, really well, you might start off with a seed launch and then go for the seed launch to the internal launch. Maybe it's 50 people or 100 people or two or 300 people. Let's get crazy, two or 300 people. But you have this very, very small list.
